testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_connectjob_api.py:46: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_connectjob_api.py:59: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [400, 401] E assert 429 in [400, 401] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
